name: Butterscotch Pudding Mix
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Basic mix (2 cups Instant nonfat dry milk, 5 cups Brown sugar, 3 cups Cornstarch, and 1 teaspoon Salt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients until they are well blended.
2. Store mix in an airtight container or tightly covered jar.
3. To use: Stir the mix from the container before measuring out 1/2 cup into a saucepan. Add 2 cups Milk and 4 tablespoons Butter, stirring until the mixture thickens and comes to a boil.
4. Continue stirring for 1 minute, remove from heat, and pour into individual serving dishes. The pudding will thicken further as it cools.
